events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs started the Western Conference finals with a win in Oklahoma City, then ended the series the same way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama, Spurs win the West, topple Thunder 111-103 in Game 7 to head to NBA Finals

video.headline: Spurs stun Thunder, clinch first NBA Finals appearance since 2014
